name: Memory retrieval degradation
triggers: irrelevant memory repeatedly included in prompts
facts_to_gather: memory corpus size and recent growth
classification_rules: if corpus becomes noisy and irrelevant hits rise then likely curation_or_index_problem
if latency rises after corpus growth then likely scaling_or_index_issue
if same wrong memories repeat then likely ranking_or_scope_problem
verification_checks: user-facing workflow quality improves if measurable
improvement_prompts: Should memory be tiered more aggressively?
Should retrieval be scoped differently by workflow?
